stemHtml: What is the difference between the on-board navigation specifications RNP 1 and RNAV 1?

options.a: A performance-monitoring and alerting function is required for RNAV 1 only.
options.b: An alerting function is required for both RNP 1 and RNAV 1. A performance-monitoring function is only required for RNP 1.
options.c: A performance-monitoring and alerting function is required for RNP 1 only.
options.d: A performance-monitoring function is required for both RNP 1 and RNAV 1. An alerting function is only required for RNP 1.
